# CWE-328 safe: Use of Weak Hash (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-328-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func HashSignupPassword(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	password := r.FormValue("password")
	salt := make([]byte, 16)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, salt); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	material := append(salt, []byte(password)...)
	sum := sha256.Sum256(material)
	digest := hex.EncodeToString(salt) + ":" + hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO accounts (email, pass_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", email, digest)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	return nil
}
